zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Heron of Ford Castle於大約1418年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，他的父親William Heron IV of Thornton, Esq.22歲，母親Isabel Umfreville20歲。他於1436年與Elizabeth Heron在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1456年被列為sheriff of towton  。他去世於1461年3月29日在英國英格蘭越可爾薩克斯頓享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾薩克斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Heron of Ford Castle于大约1418年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，他的父亲William Heron IV of Thornton, Esq.22岁，母亲Isabel Umfreville20岁。他于1436年与Elizabeth Heron在英国諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1456年被列为sheriff of towton  。他去世于1461年3月29日在英国英格兰越可爾薩克斯頓享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾薩克斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Heron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Herron  .
French (Héron): nickname for a tall, thin person, thought to resemble a heron (Old French hairon).

variants.name: Herron
meanings: English: habitational name from Harome (North Yorkshire), from Old English (æt thǣm) hārum ‘at the (gray) stones’, dative plural of hār ‘gray, stone’.

English and Scottish: nickname probably for a tall, thin man with long legs, from Old French hairon ‘heron’, Anglo-Norman French heron, Middle English heiroun, heyron, herne, heron. Compare Hearn and Heron .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from (Le) Héron in France (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Heron of Ford Castle was born about 1418, in Northumberland, England, his father, William Heron IV of Thornton, Esq., was 22 and his mother, Isabel Umfreville, was 20. He married Elizabeth Heron in 1436, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. In 1456, his occupation is listed as sheriff of towton  . He died on 29 March 1461, in Saxton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Saxton, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Heron of Ford Castle est né environ 1418, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William Heron IV of Thornton, Esq., avait 22 ans et sa mère, Isabel Umfreville, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Heron en 1436, à Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. En 1456, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of towton  . Il est décédé le 29 mars 1461, à Saxton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Saxton, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Saxton, Selby District, North Yorkshire,: Saxton, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Heron of Ford Castle um 1418 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Heron IV of Thornton, Esq. 22 und seine Mutter Isabel Umfreville 20. Er hat 1436 in Northumberland, England Elizabeth Heron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1456 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of towton   aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. März 1461 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Saxton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Saxton, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Heron of Ford Castle è nato il circa 1418 nel Northumberland, England, il suo padre, William Heron IV of Thornton, Esq., aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Umfreville, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Heron nel 1436, nel Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1456, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of towton  . Morì il 29 marzo 1461, nel Saxton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Saxton, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Heron of Ford Castleが約1418年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父William Heron IV of Thornton, Esq.は22歳，母Isabel Umfrevilleは20歳であった。1436年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでElizabeth Heronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1456年，職業はsheriff of towton  と記録されている。彼は1461年3月29日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアサクストンで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアサクストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Heron of Ford Castle(이)가 대략 1418년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Heron IV of Thornton, Esq.(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Umfreville(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1436년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Elizabeth Heron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1456년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of towton  이었다. 그는 1461년 3월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 사스턴에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 사스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Heron of Ford Castle nasceu aproximadamente 1418, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Heron IV of Thornton, Esq., tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Umfreville, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Heron em 1436, em Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1456, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of towton  . Ele faleceu em 29 de março de 1461, em Saxton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Saxton, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Saxton, Selby District, North Yorkshire,: Saxton, North Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Heron of Ford Castle родился около 1418 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени William Heron IV of Thornton, Esq. было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Umfreville, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Heron в 1436 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1456 году он работал по профессии sheriff of towton  . Он умер 29 марта 1461 г. в местности сакстон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности сакстон, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Heron of Ford Castle nació aproximadamente 1418, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William Heron IV of Thornton, Esq., tenía 22 años y su mamá, Isabel Umfreville, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Heron en 1436, en Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. En 1456, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of towton  . Murió el 29 de marzo de 1461, en Saxton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Saxton, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
